title: More bad news for AIADMK as four ex-ministers join Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Joseph Vijay’s TVK
description: The AIADMK won a total of 47 seats in the 2026 Tamil Nadu assembly elections, but days later four of them, Maragatham Kumarave, Jayakumar, P Sathyabama and Esaki Subaya, resigned to join TVK.
